blocked_reason: Stage 2 implementation is partially complete: Strategy1 now has VWAP-gated runtime/replay logic, minute-first daily validation replay with per-day VWAP/source diagnostics, validation-page non-blank chart/error states for degraded data, replay candidate-signal visibility when VWAP is unavailable, session-scoped VWAP handling that no longer reuses stale prior-day VWAP, mismatch detection APIs, validation-page VWAP/mismatch/manual-correction visibility, a read-only main-dashboard operator cockpit with live 1-minute candles/VWAP/runtime visibility, and local startup hardening for the dashboard via a self-contained production image, maintenance fallback page, staged start-dev orchestration, and offline-safe typography. Remaining blockers before Stage 3 review: 5min/15min bucket completeness checks and operator-facing manual correction submission UI.
